name: cozy
description: Morning kitchen warmth with banana leaf servings and steam rising from freshly cooked dishes. This mood captures the comfort of home-cooked Malaysian food — the kind of scene where you can almost smell the rendang simmering.

style.lighting: warm golden hour | soft window light | ambient kitchen glow
style.color_grade: warm amber tones | soft cream highlights | muted greens
style.camera: close-up food detail | medium shot table setting | slow dolly across spread
style.composition: banana leaf as hero surface | steam in foreground | hands serving food
style.props: banana leaf, wooden table, traditional kuih molds, ceramic bowls, rattan placemats, morning tea
style.atmosphere: comforting, homey, intimate, serene, nostalgic warmth

copy_tone: Gentle and inviting, like whispering a family recipe. Short sentences, sensory words — warmth, aroma, home. Makes the reader feel wrapped in comfort.
example_prompt_fragment: A warm morning kitchen scene, soft golden light streaming through window onto a banana leaf lined with nasi lemak, steam rising gently from sambal, close-up of hands placing a fried egg, ceramic teacup nearby, shallow depth of field, warm cream and green tones, magazine editorial food photography style
